review_text: App crashes every time I try to open the calendar view. This started happening after the 3.0.1 update. I've tried reinstalling but no luck. Completely unusable now.
Can't login since the last update. It just shows a spinning wheel forever. I'm on iPhone 14 running iOS 17.4. Please fix this ASAP, I have important tasks in there.
Data sync is completely broken. My tasks on Android aren't syncing with my desktop. Lost 2 days of work because of this bug. Very frustrated.
The app freezes when I try to add a new task while offline. It worked fine before. Now it just hangs and I have to force close it. Samsung Galaxy S23, Android 14.
Notifications are not showing up at all after the latest update. I have all permissions enabled. Galaxy Note 20, Android 13. Steps: open app > settings > notifications > enable all. Still nothing.
Please add a dark mode option! I use this app late at night and the bright white screen is really hard on the eyes. Would give 5 stars if you add this.
Would love to see a Pomodoro timer built into the app. Currently I have to switch between apps for time management. Integration would be amazing!
Missing the ability to export tasks to PDF or Excel. I need to share my task lists with my team in meetings. Please add export functionality.
Please add Google Calendar integration. It's frustrating to manage tasks in this app and calendar events in Google Calendar separately. Sync would be a game changer.
A recurring tasks feature would be great. Right now I have to manually re-create the same tasks every week. Automation would save so much time.
Amazing app! It has completely transformed how I manage my day. Clean interface, fast, and reliable. Best productivity app I've ever used. Highly recommend!
Love the new collaboration features in 3.0! My team is so much more organized now. The shared workspaces are intuitive and the notifications work perfectly.
Works perfectly for my daily planning. Simple, elegant, and does exactly what it promises. The widget for the home screen is a nice touch too.
This app saved my productivity. I went from missing deadlines to being the most organized person on my team. Thank you for building such a great product!
The app is way too expensive for what it offers. $9.99 per month for basic task management? There are free alternatives that do the same thing. Not worth it.
App is noticeably slow when you have more than 100 tasks. Loading the main screen takes 5-6 seconds on my Pixel 7. Performance needs serious improvement.
Customer support is terrible. I've sent 3 emails about my sync issue and haven't heard back in a week. The app itself has bugs and nobody helps.
